title: Mustardy Fluffy Canadian Biscuit Bake
description: A unique twist on traditional biscuits, this low-fat-friendly bake features digestive biscuits, mustard, and a wood-fired finish.
instructions: Crush the digestive biscuits into fine crumbs.
Melt the mustard and olive oil in a saucepan over low heat.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the low-fat milk, salt, and baking powder.
Add the breadcrumb mixture and whisk until smooth.
Add the crushed biscuit mixture and stir until well combined.
Fold in the chopped thyme and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 20cm x 20cm baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the bake from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
